name: Heroines Run the Show
original_name: ヒロインたるもの！〜嫌われヒロインと内緒のお仕事〜
overview: What would you do to pursue your passion? For Hiyori Suzumi, it’s leaving her simple rural hometown for the bustling city of Tokyo to join Sakuragaoka High School’s track team. Between being a manager-in-training for two cutthroat schoolboy idols, track, and friends, Hiyori shows no signs of slowing down.

trailers.title: Heroines Run the Show | OFFICIAL TRAILER
